member.name: M:HackerNewsBestStories.Api.Controllers.StoriesController.GetBestStories(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get the best n stories from Hacker News
member.param: Number of top stories to return (1-200)
member.returns: Array of top stories sorted by score
member.response: Returns the list of top stories
If Hacker News API is unavailable
